message:
feat(sync): Add bracket combinator, determinism oracle, and conformance tests

Enhance the asupersync library with improved synchronization primitives
and testing infrastructure:

Combinator Enhancements (src/combinator/bracket.rs):
- Add bracket combinator for resource acquisition/release patterns
- Ensure cleanup runs even on panic or early return
- Support nested bracket scopes with proper unwinding

Oracle System (src/lab/oracle/determinism.rs):
- Add determinism oracle for detecting non-deterministic behavior
- Capture execution traces for replay debugging
- Configurable sensitivity for timing-related non-determinism

Event Tracing (src/trace/event.rs):
- Enhanced event tracing for synchronization operations
- Better causality tracking between events
- Support for distributed trace correlation

Tests:
- tests/bracket_repro.rs: Reproduction cases for bracket edge cases
- tests/sync_conformance.rs: Conformance test suite for sync primitives

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
